sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuid_table (id UUID, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_uuid_table SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = generateUUIDv4();
SELECT id, name, dictGetUUID('test_uuid_table', 'id', toUInt64(1)) AS fetched_uuid FROM test_uuid_table;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_uuid_table WHERE id IN (generateUUIDv4(), generateUUIDv4());
